description: Use this API to get real extension data. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.1.0. ierr, rval = get_ext_real(tblname, string, irow)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the extension field desired. (input).

parameters.name: irow
parameters.description: Row index of desired data item. (input).

error_codes.description: Bad data type for field ‘STRING’; ‘RVAL’ not set.
Unknown error with data access; ‘RVAL’ not set.
Data table row index ‘IROW’ out-of-bounds; ‘RVAL’ not set.
